name: Watergate Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Chopped Nuts (Pecans are the Best)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the ingredients in the order given, blending well after each addition.
2. Pour into a 13 x 9-inch pan and bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 35 to 45 minutes, or until done.
3. For the icing: Combine the topping mix, milk, and pudding. Beat until thick.
4. Spread the icing on the cake. The icing will be a light green color.
5. Sprinkle with the coconut and chopped nuts.
